title: Reorder View Tabs
excerpt: Allow user to move View tabs around and reorder for more logical viewing/organization

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: Allow user to move View tabs around and reorder for more logical viewing/organization

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KCordaro

Good news, there’s already another feature request on this available and monday has marked it as coming soon. What soon means is undefined but we can probably expect it in the upcoming months.

Best,

Maarten
